description_long: This is a large, modern pink house with multiple stories and a bold geometric design, featuring extensive glass windows and a flat roof. The structure includes a prominent front façade with arched windows and a covered entryway, as well as a multi-car garage and a driveway. Adjacent to the house is a spacious outdoor area with a freeform swimming pool and a hot tub, both set on a dark tiled patio. The house has several balconies and terraces, some with railings and others with open access, providing ample outdoor living space. The windows are arranged in a mix of large panels and smaller sections, creating an asymmetrical yet balanced appearance. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines, bright colors, and a focus on indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description: A large, modern pink house with flat roofs, extensive glass windows, a multi-car garage, and a pool with hot tub on a tiled patio. The design features bold geometric shapes, balconies, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with arched windows, the multi-car garage, driveway, and the pool area with hot tub to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical window arrangement, the pool and hot tub in the foreground, and the layered structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the driveway, garage, and the pool area to the left, with visible balconies and terraces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and additional balconies, with the main house structure and windows visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features arched windows, a covered porch, and multiple glass doors, with steps leading up and decorative columns.
